parameters.toolDescription: Get a comprehensive summary of a Celigo integration: its details, all flows (active/disabled counts), connections, and error counts in a single call. Use when someone asks 'tell me about integration X' or 'what does integration X contain?'

_meta.description: Wave 0 prototype — composite 4-API-call tool. Validates parallel HTTP calls and Code node result merging.
_meta.note_on_credentials: Create an n8n credential of type 'Header Auth' with Name='Authorization' and Value='Bearer YOUR_CELIGO_API_KEY'. Replace CELIGO_CREDENTIAL_ID in all 3 HTTP nodes.
_meta.note_on_parallel: Fetch Flows, Fetch Errors, Fetch Connections run in parallel (fan-out from Fetch Integration). Merge Results Code node receives all 3 responses and merges them. n8n runs fan-out branches sequentially but it's still faster than sequential individual calls.
_meta.note_on_data_flow: MCP Trigger input is referenced with $('MCP Trigger').first().json in downstream nodes since the input is not forwarded through Fetch Integration automatically.
